search_query: church in Ruch Oregon Applegate Valley
combined_text: Applegate Christian Fellowship: Wikis "Applegate Christian Fellowship (ACF) is a Christian church located in Ruch, Oregon, an unincorporated hamlet in the Applegate Valley in the vicinity of Jacksonville, Oregon.
